---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Docker version: [e.g. 27.x]
- Browser (if UI issue): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Ollama version: [e.g. 0.3.x]
- Models in use: [e.g. qwen3:1.7b, lfm2:latest]

## Logs
```
Paste relevant output from: docker compose logs fkv-api fkv-worker
```

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem here.
